_: Human-edited config for the bot-trade Board. Run `node generate.mjs` (needs gh CLI, or any `gh` shim printing the merged-PR JSON) to regenerate board.data.js. Served at /board/ on the deployed site.

project.name: bot-trade
project.subtitle: fib 61.8% autotrading bot — Build · Product · Governance · Docs · Crew

branchBlurbs.Confluence filters: Optional RSI / VWAP / FVG gates — each must earn its place in an A/B backtest.
branchBlurbs.Backtest & evidence: Walk-forward on real broker bars: GO / THIN DATA / NO-GO, tail risk, tap-for-evidence.
branchBlurbs.Risk & safety: Deterministic pre-trade gate: 1%/trade, daily cap, R:R floor, spread gate, equity stop.
branchBlurbs.Strategy & autotrade: The fib 61.8% fade — closed bars only, conviction-gated, real orders with broker-side SL/TP.
branchBlurbs.Monitor & live feed: The glanceable truth: scans, decisions, positions, live ticks, charts.
branchBlurbs.Broker & accounts: cTrader Open API: accounts, symbol maps, snapshots, one-tap account switching.
branchBlurbs.Auth, Telegram & persistence: Telegram-code device login, alerts with version footers, persistent DB.
branchBlurbs.UI & design system: Colorblind-safe (no green ever), left nav, folio tabs, proper form controls.
branchBlurbs.Research & docs: FinWorld KDD'26 + market-microstructure studies — formulas kept, hype rejected.
branchBlurbs.Groundwork & misc: Versioning, CI gates, cleanup and cross-cutting merges.

lanes.name: Filter A/B on real bars
lanes.sub: base vs RSI vs VWAP vs FVG

gates: owner is red/green colorblind — blue=up, red=down
deterministic veto — no LLM in the trade path
DB_PATH set; Volume mount at /data unconfirmed
guards: Demo first, LIVE never by default
typing LIVE required to select a real-money account
two parallel sessions merge to one main
risks: backtest GO is necessary, not sufficient
1% risk < min lot — gate vetoes everything (by design)
agent features ship dark until Railway redeploys

ledger.text: Charting per position, live feed, real demo autotrading (fib retracement/extension).
All three delivered — bot ARMED on demo, SL/TP at broker, Telegram buzzer.
'Why no trades' — quiet screens read as broken; Monitor now explains itself.
Risk tab redesign · account switcher · evidence-based verdicts · tail risk.
Study FinWorld + microstructure repos — adopt only what survives critique.
Spread gate, MDD p95 bootstrap, CVaR(95), VWAP+FVG filters shipped.
Two days, OK approvals, zero positions — placement failures were silent.
order_failed now loud (risk event + Telegram) · dead-code sweep · Trade-now burst.

journal.name: PR stream
journal.note: every change is a squash-merged, CI-gated PR

leaderboardNote: Two Claude sessions built this in parallel against one main; counts are PRs primarily driven.
leaderboard: every friction report became a fix

taskforces.desc: Redeploy Railway (+ attach the /data Volume), then the next OK either fills or names its blocker.
Backtest base vs RSI vs VWAP vs FVG on the armed timeframes; keep only what improves PF.

crew.job: Swing detection, 61.8% zones, conviction scoring on closed bars; optional RSI/VWAP/FVG confluence.

crew.role: Owns the last word before any order.
crew.job: 1%/trade, daily cap, R:R floor, SL distance, margin, cooldowns, spread gate, equity stop.
Market orders with server-side SL/TP, reconcile, spot streams, trendbars, account snapshots.
crew.guard: Protection lives at the broker, not in the process.

crew.job: Entries, exits, vetoes, order failures, equity stops, login codes — with version footers.
crew.guard: Silence is a bug. Every terminal outcome pings.
